symbols: floodwaters covering the land — the power of water as both destroyer and renewer in the biblical imagination
distant church steeple amid the flood — faith enduring above the waters of chaos
birds in flight over the waters — the Spirit hovering over the face of the deep, or the dove seeking dry land after the Flood
bare trees emerging from water — dormant life awaiting resurrection and renewal
vast overcast sky — the heavens as dome over the primordial waters
description: A sepia-toned landscape drawing depicting a vast, flat terrain inundated by floodwaters in early spring. The foreground shows dark, waterlogged earth and shallow pools reflecting the pale sky. In the middle distance, a cluster of bare trees and the silhouette of a small church with a steeple rise from a low island of land surrounded by water. A flock of birds flies across the expansive, overcast sky. The composition is dominated by the enormous sky, which occupies roughly two-thirds of the picture, with wispy clouds scattered across it.
